content.json:
# NorthWind Policy Hub — Operations Workbook
Customer activity, API health, and business events tracked via Application Insights.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize
    Total     = count(),
    Success   = countif(success == true),
    Failed    = countif(success == false),
    AvgDurMs  = round(avg(duration), 1),
    P95DurMs  = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1)
| project Total, Success, Failed, AvgDurMs, P95DurMs
content.title: Request summary

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by resultCode
| order by Count desc
content.title: HTTP status code breakdown

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize FailedCount = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: Failed requests over time (15 min bins)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'customer.login'
| summarize Logins = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Logins per hour

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'customer.login'
| extend email = tostring(customDimensions.email)
| summarize LoginCount = count() by email
| order by LoginCount desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 most active customers

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'policy.viewed'
| extend policyType = tostring(customDimensions.type)
| summarize Views = count() by policyType
| render piechart
content.title: Policy views by type (auto vs home)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'policy.viewed'
| summarize Views = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Policy views over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'coverage.changed'
| extend
    policyType  = tostring(customDimensions.policyType),
    oldPremium  = todouble(customDimensions.oldPremium),
    newPremium  = todouble(customDimensions.newPremium),
    changedKeys = tostring(customDimensions.changedKeys)
| project timestamp, policyType, changedKeys, oldPremium, newPremium,
    delta = round(newPremium - oldPremium, 2)
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Recent coverage changes

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'coverage.changed'
| extend changedKeys = tostring(customDimensions.changedKeys)
| mv-expand key = split(changedKeys, ',')
| summarize Changes = count() by tostring(key)
| order by Changes desc
content.title: Most frequently changed coverage options

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'claim.opened'
| extend
    policyType   = tostring(customDimensions.policyType),
    incidentType = tostring(customDimensions.incidentType),
    claimNumber  = tostring(customDimensions.claimNumber)
| project timestamp, claimNumber, policyType, incidentType
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Claims opened

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'claim.opened'
| extend incidentType = tostring(customDimensions.incidentType)
| summarize Claims = count() by incidentType
| order by Claims desc
content.title: Claims by incident type

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ('customer.login', 'policy.viewed', 'coverage.changed', 'claim.opened')
| summarize Count = count() by name, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: All business events over time
